easy.problem: Implement a basic routine demonstrating the startup code syntax for Promise All Concurrency.
hints: Review the syntax rules in the beginner notes.

medium.problem: Refactor the simple routine to support dynamic inputs and raise an exception on out-of-bounds parameters.
hints: Use conditional statements to inspect values.
medium.explanation: Ensures input validation constraints are met.

hard.problem: Optimize the routine to run in O(1) time complexity by caching duplicate lookup cycles.
hints: Store results after the first query.

debugging.problem: Locate and correct the spelling mismatch preventing this routine from executing.
